Smart Restaurant POS — How to run
==================================

Open this folder and double-click `smart_pos.exe`.

That's it. No installation, no configuration. The first launch will create the
`data/` files (menu, inventory, tables, default admin user, etc.) automatically.

Default login on a fresh install:
    Username:  admin
    Password:  admin123

Requirements:
- 64-bit Windows 10 or 11
- A GPU that supports OpenGL 3.3 or higher (every modern PC qualifies)

Everything required to run the app is in this folder:
- smart_pos.exe            (the application)
- sfml-graphics-3.dll      | SFML 3.1.0 runtime
- sfml-window-3.dll        |
- sfml-system-3.dll        |
- sfml-audio-3.dll         |
- libgcc_s_seh-1.dll       | MinGW-w64 GCC runtime
- libstdc++-6.dll          |
- libwinpthread-1.dll      |
- assets/                  (fonts and images)
- data/                    (text + binary data, created on first run)

If you ever want to reset to a blank install, delete the entire `data/` folder.
The app will recreate it from defaults the next time it starts.

Troubleshooting:
- "The application was unable to start correctly (0xc000007b)":
  you may be on a 32-bit version of Windows. This build is 64-bit only.
- Window opens then closes immediately: open `data/log.txt` for the error.
